array_types.name: Stack_Entries_Type
array_types.code:
type Stack_Entries_Type is
  array (1 ..
         Stack_Size_In_Bytes /
         (System.Storage_Elements.Integer_Address'Size / System.Storage_Unit)) of Stack_Entry_Type with
  Convention => C,
  Alignment  =>
   Stack_Entry_Type'Size / System.Storage_Unit;

array_types.name: Stack_Overflow_Guard_Type
array_types.code:
type Stack_Overflow_Guard_Type is
  array (1 .. HiRTOS_Cpu_Arch_Parameters.Memory_Region_Alignment) of Interfaces.Unsigned_8 with
  Size =>
   HiRTOS_Cpu_Arch_Parameters.Memory_Region_Alignment * Interfaces.Unsigned_8'Size,
   Alignment => HiRTOS_Cpu_Arch_Parameters.Memory_Region_Alignment;

record_types.name: Execution_Stack_Type
